mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50% of months following rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, labor market slack signals weakening consumer demand and corporate earnings deterioration, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 65% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 5.0%, or the t-statistic of the return difference is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real state sales combined with stable consumer price inflation indicates healthy housing demand without monetary overheating, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in more than 60% of triggered months, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a monetary easing cycle reflects expanding capacity utilization and rising corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: The signal produces negative returns in more than 55% of observations during easing periods, or the predictive power vanishes when FEDFUNDS is rising.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly nonfarm payroll additions exceeding 100,000 confirm robust economic growth and sustained wage growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases by >100k in a single month
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 60% of months following payrolls above 100k, or the signal shows zero predictive IC over a 5-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation alongside a static federal funds rate forces expectations of imminent monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict negative returns with a p-value below 0.10, or equity markets rally despite inflation spikes in more than 70% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized growth in industrial production and real GDP confirms broad-based economic expansion, supporting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The signal yields negative forward returns in more than 55% of quarters, or the correlation between macro growth and equity returns drops below 0.10 in out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in housing starts signal deteriorating construction activity and weakening consumer confidence, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines for two consecutive months
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 65% of instances following consecutive housing starts declines, or the signal loses predictive accuracy during periods of rising interest rates.
